title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions:
Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group Ventures Solutions!
